ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "county_goal" INTEGER /* Fundraising goal for the county */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the county was added to the system */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the county's details were last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the campaign belongs to */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "target_amount" REAL /* Target amount for the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the campaign started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the campaign ends */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the campaign */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the campaign (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaigns_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "donations" (
  "donation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each donation */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign the donation belongs to */,
  "donation_date" TEXT /* Date the donation was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the donation */,
  "donation_type" TEXT /* Type of donation (e.g., in-person, online) */,
  "donor_name" TEXT /* Name of the donor */,
  "donor_email" TEXT /* Email address of the donor */,
  "anonymous" INTEGER /* Whether the donation is anonymous */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("donation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_donations_donation_type FOREIGN KEY ("donation_type") REFERENCES donation_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_donations_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "donation_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each donation type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the donation type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the donation type */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the donation type was added to the system */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the donation type's details were last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fundraising_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fundraising progress entry */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign the progress belongs to */,
  "total_paid" REAL /* Total amount paid towards the campaign goal */,
  "needed_for_goal" REAL /* Amount still needed to reach the campaign goal */,
  "percent_of_goal" REAL /* Percentage of the goal reached */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the progress was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fundraising_progress_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign team */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign the team belongs to */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_lead" TEXT /* Leader of the team */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the team's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_teams_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., campaign manager, finance team, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission belongs to */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign the permission is for */,
  "can_view" INTEGER /* Whether the user can view the campaign data */,
  "can_edit" INTEGER /* Whether the user can edit the campaign data */,
  "can_delete" INTEGER /* Whether the user can delete the campaign data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the campaign */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the campaign was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the campaign data */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of the changes made to the campaign data */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_versions_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the notification was sent to */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign the notification is related to */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., fundraising update, new donation) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign the report belongs to */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., fundraising progress, donor list) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)
